---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<div id="site-header">
<h1>Dog Capital</h1>
<p>Systematic strategies for Argentine investors</p>
</div>

<div id="programs" style="padding: 4rem 0 2rem 0;">

### Programs

- [ETF Core](programs/etf-core.qmd) — Vol-targeted CEDEARs for Argentine investors
- [ES Core](programs/es-core.qmd) — Vol-targeted S&P 500 futures

</div>

<div id="site-footer">
&copy; 2026 Dog Capital &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Buenos Aires
</div>
